keyFindings.description: Dead type definitions (ConsolidationReport, IndexMutation, StatusMutation) have zero external references — superseded by implementation-specific types in consolidate.ts and promoter.ts
Unused side-effect call on line 63: resolveLegionPaths return value discarded (appears to be validation)
canonicalizeLearningPath doesn't strip ./docs/solutions/ prefix variant (minor edge case)
Disposition naming drift: JSON output uses internal names (accepted/needs_review/archived/rejected) vs spec (promote/review/stale/keep). Human report maps correctly.
generatedAt changes between idempotent runs (cosmetic, expected behavior)
